name: dev.weblens/weblens
description: Premium web intelligence API — scraping, search, extraction, research, intel. Pay-per-request USDC.

remotes.description: Remote MCP endpoint — works with any MCP client. Paid tool calls use x402 (402 Payment Required → sign → retry) or credit-account auth.

packages.description: Local stdio wrapper. Ships an auto-paying x402 client so agents pay transparently when given a funded PRIVATE_KEY.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base mainnet wallet private key funded with USDC. The stdio wrapper signs x402 payments on your behalf.
